title: Toyota to launch joint venture with US flying car maker Joby Aviation
summary:

fullArticle:
Japanese automaker will share production technology to improve quality, boost output

Toyota Motor and Joby Aviation are looking toward the commercialization of air taxis through their planned startup. (Photo by Kosuke Okamoto)

NAGOYA, Japan -- Toyota Motor has agreed to create a joint venture with Joby Aviation, a U.S. startup developing personal aircraft commonly known as "flying cars."...
